text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 363 

PRE_ICL_LTCP_COINS_B_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Long Term Care Pharmacy Coinsurance for 1-month supply of brand name drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a 1-month supply of brand name 
drugs on this tier, using long term care pharmacy (LTCP) during the pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: —
